scope: AgenC session memory lives under runtime/src/memory/session and preserves session-scoped notes extraction, prompt generation, path resolution, and compact/read helpers.

requiredBehaviors: Session memory initializes after threshold checks and extracts at natural conversation breaks.
Session memory runs through a live child agent with an Edit-only policy for the exact notes file.
The live turn loop launches post-sampling session-memory extraction and surfaces update failures.
edgeCases: Non-main query sources and active tool turns do not trigger extraction.
Manual extraction reports an empty conversation instead of spawning a child agent.
Oversized existing notes files fail before unbounded reads.

requiredBehaviors: Session notes paths are scoped by AgenC config home, canonical project key, and session id.
Extraction state tracks initialization, last summarized marker, in-progress extraction, and token growth.
edgeCases: Falsy enablement env vars disable the feature.
Missing or inaccessible notes content returns null for readers.

requiredBehaviors: Default notes template and update prompt preserve the required session sections.
Custom prompt and template files load from AgenC config home.
Variable substitution is single-pass and compact insertion truncates oversized sections on line boundaries.
All live callers import session memory from runtime/src/memory/session.
The old runtime/src/services/SessionMemory directory is removed.
edgeCases: Tests and contract mocks use the canonical memory path.
